description_long: This object is a round, shallow ashtray with a wide, flat base and gently sloping sides, made from a metallic material with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The rim is broad and curves inward, forming a recessed central area for collecting ash and cigarette butts. The surface appears seamless, with no visible slots, grooves, or notches for holding cigarettes. Its minimalist design suggests durability and ease of cleaning, suitable for high-traffic urban environments. The color is a uniform dark gray, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance. There are no visible markings, labels, or decorative elements on its exterior.
description: A round, metallic ashtray with a smooth, glossy dark gray finish and a wide, recessed center. It has a minimalist, seamless design with no visible slots or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full circular opening and the broad, inward-curving rim.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlights the shallow depth and smooth, continuous surface.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, showing the same circular opening and rim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying the uniform, seamless design and shallow profile.
